scope: ACL 2027 supplement page 14 navigation derivation companion v4 visual-density iteration

motivation.target_page_before: Round 15 density audit ranked page 14 as the lowest non-reference page after the theory evidence bridge v2 pass.
motivation.goal_alignment: Use a text-free AI navigation formula-to-route gate slot plus additional registered route and still panels to make the navigation derivation companion less sparse without increasing the supplement page count.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, used for sparse-page raster review
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual reading guide linking navigation formulas SR, NE, SPL, and TL to registered route, still, and case panels
claim_boundary.notes: The navigation metric gate v4 AI slot is a schematic for reading structure only. Evidence-bearing panels remain registered navigation metric panels, route stills, selected case panels, and 0036/0066 route-case figures composed by paper/shared/figures/gen_supplement_task_media_atlases.py.

navigation_metric_gate.role: AI-generated navigation formula-to-route gate schematic only; deterministic figure code draws paper labels and all evidence-source annotations.

final_figure.local_visual_evidence: The standalone v4 companion replaces the short two-row strip with a compact three-band formula-to-route visual bridge, route-outcome anchors, and a route-pair audit wall. The v4 AI slot contains no readable text; evidence-bearing panels are registered route and still figures.

rejected_intermediate.reason: The standalone figure was visually strong, but the supplement grew from 45 to 46 pages because the Metric Boundary Summary caption spilled to a new page.
rejected_intermediate.resolution: Compressed the same v4 content to 1800x700 and 0.30 textheight; the final PDF returns to 45 pages.

pdf_review.local_visual_evidence: Rendered page 14 keeps the denser navigation bridge and complete caption on page 14 while preserving the Navigation Metrics heading and first SR equation on the same page. Page 15 keeps the metric-boundary figure and caption on one page, and page 16 still begins the VLM protocol section.

post_review_density_audit.page14_status: Page 14 is no longer the lowest non-reference page after the v4 placement; page 41 becomes the next target.

tests.result: RED first for missing formula-to-route wording, v4 slot/source, include height, and figure height; GREEN after final 1800x700 implementation with 2 passed, 72 deselected.
completed from paper/venues/acl27; first 840px attempt produced 46 pages and was rejected, final 700px attempt produced 45 A4 pages.
completed; pages 14-16 regenerated for local visual and density review.
completed; page 14 regenerated at 90 dpi for direct comparison with the round 15 density baseline.
completed; round 16 full-density audit ranks page 41 as the next non-reference target.

review_mode.reason: Local pure visual review was used; no separate clean-room subagent was dispatched because independent delegation was not explicitly requested and the multi-agent tool only permits spawning under explicit delegation requests.

residual_risk: This pass improves page 14 but does not complete the broader supplement-wide visual iteration. Round 16 ranks page 41 as the next low-density non-reference page.
